title: Assist with harvest and pre-processing of medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with harvest and pre-processing of medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for medicinal cannabis harvest and pre-processing tasks

pcs.text: Identify and confirm harvest and pre-processing tasks, workplace procedures and specifications with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm harvest and pre-processing tasks, workplace procedures and specifications with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm harvest and pre-processing tasks, workplace procedures and specifications with supervisor.

pcs.text: Recognise health and safety hazards, and report safety concerns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise health and safety hazards, and report safety concerns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise health and safety hazards, and report safety concerns.

pcs.text: Collect required tools, equipment and materials for tasks, and check for approval and functionality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect required tools, equipment and materials for tasks, and check for approval and functionality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect required tools, equipment and materials for tasks, and check for approval and functionality.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment according to health and safety and hygiene requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to health and safety and hygiene requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to health and safety and hygiene requirements.

pcs.text: Apply personal hygiene and equipment sanitation procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply personal hygiene and equipment sanitation procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply personal hygiene and equipment sanitation procedures.

pcs.text: Check work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for medicinal cannabis harvest and pre-processing tasks

elements.title: Assist with harvest tasks

pcs.text: Identify and inspect medicinal plants to be harvested, including flowering stems to be cut, and confirm quantity and weights with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and inspect medicinal plants to be harvested, including flowering stems to be cut, and confirm quantity and weights with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and inspect medicinal plants to be harvested, including flowering stems to be cut, and confirm quantity and weights with supervisor.

pcs.text: Check plant health prior to commencing harvesting tasks, including signs of disease or pests, and report abnormalities or presence of disease or pests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check plant health prior to commencing harvesting tasks, including signs of disease or pests, and report abnormalities or presence of disease or pests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check plant health prior to commencing harvesting tasks, including signs of disease or pests, and report abnormalities or presence of disease or pests.

pcs.text: Check climate control, including temperature, humidity and airflow levels according to specifications, and report levels that are out of acceptable range
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check climate control, including temperature, humidity and airflow levels according to specifications, and report levels that are out of acceptable range?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check climate control, including temperature, humidity and airflow levels according to specifications, and report levels that are out of acceptable range.

pcs.text: Assist with cutting flowering stems and place in harvest containers according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with cutting flowering stems and place in harvest containers according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with cutting flowering stems and place in harvest containers according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Handle harvested stems in a way that minimises damage to flower and avoids contact with growing media
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle harvested stems in a way that minimises damage to flower and avoids contact with growing media?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle harvested stems in a way that minimises damage to flower and avoids contact with growing media.

pcs.text: Confirm weight of harvested stems, and transfer to the drying room using safe practices and according to entry and exiting procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm weight of harvested stems, and transfer to the drying room using safe practices and according to entry and exiting procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm weight of harvested stems, and transfer to the drying room using safe practices and according to entry and exiting procedures.

pcs.text: Remove remaining plant material from growing media and dispose of according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove remaining plant material from growing media and dispose of according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove remaining plant material from growing media and dispose of according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assist with harvest tasks

pcs.text: Assist with trimming harvested stems according to supervisor instructions

pcs.text: Assist with drying process according to supervisor instructions

pcs.text: Assist with milling for extraction according to supervisor instructions as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with milling for extraction according to supervisor instructions as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with milling for extraction according to supervisor instructions as required.

pcs.text: Weigh, record, and remove and dispose of plant material waste according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh, record, and remove and dispose of plant material waste according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh, record, and remove and dispose of plant material waste according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights.
